title: Forgium
description: A large tech, magic, adventure, and QOL modpack with a shader for good measure.
body:
Forgium is a thoughtfully crafted modpack featuring mainly tech mods like Create, Immersive Engineering, and Refined Storage, as well as many small quality-of-life mods and a shader for good measure. In this modpack you can explore the solar system, cook delicious food, and automate resource collection.

#### This modpack is fairly large, so it may crash on low power computers. I would recommend setting graphics to fast and your render distance to 8 or so.
